CVE-2020-28638.title: ask_password in Tomb 2.0 through 2.7 returns a warning when pinen ...
CVE-2020-28638.description: ask_password in Tomb 2.0 through 2.7 returns a warning when pinentry-curses is used and $DISPLAY is non-empty, causing affected users' files to be encrypted with "tomb {W] Detected DISPLAY, but only pinentry-curses is found." as the encryption key.
